title: Bare Bones 3D Mace Wind Burst Effect
description: Enjoy your traillers experience with an accurate Mace 3D model in First & Third person while staying in 2D in the GUI + Wind Burst Effect 💨
body:
# [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) version of [3D Mace Wind Burst Effect](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-mace-wind-burst-effect)
### 📜 Features
- 3D Model when held in first person, third person, on the ground and on the shelf
- 2D Default look when in inventory and item frame
- Low wind effect arround the core when enchanted with Wind Burst I or II
- High wind effect arround the core when enchanted with Wind Burst III
- Vanilla accurate first & third person viewmodel

### ⚠️ Compatibility
> ✅ **Vanilla 1.21.5+**

### 🗨️ Contact
> My Discord DM -> caiosm1
